text:
value indicates which tiers are on the 
formulary. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: DED_COSTSHARE_TIERS 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 6 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: Binary character string, where each digit is a 1 or 0, to accommodate each tier. Each position of the 
character string represents a tier. For example, if the value=100001 (1s in the 1st and 6th digit), then 
cost sharing applies to the 5th and 6th tiers of the formulary. 

 1 in 2nd digit = Tier 1 
 1 in 3rd digit = Tier 2 
 1 in 4th
